product_updates.title: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
product_updates.content: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

product_updates.title: Anthropic buys biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: Reports
product_updates.content: Anthropic has purchased the stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to The Information and Eric Newcomer.

product_updates.title: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
product_updates.content: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.

product_updates.title: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers. What could go wrong?
product_updates.content: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are all betting big on new natural gas power plants to run their AI data centers. They may regret it.

product_updates.title: People would rather have an Amazon warehouse in their backyard than a data center
product_updates.content: A new poll shows that the debate over data centers is far from settled.

product_updates.title: The Facebook insider building content moderation for the AI era
product_updates.content: Moonbounce has raised $12 million to grow its AI control engine that converts content moderation policies into consistent, predictable AI behavior.

technical_breakthroughs.title: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
technical_breakthroughs.content: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Four things we’d need to put data centers in space
technical_breakthroughs.content: MIT Technology Review Explains: Let our writers untangle the complex, messy world of technology to help you understand what’s coming next.
